rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §32.1021 governs standards for electronic devices and software applications in schools. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subject matter; no conflict exists.
quote: The agency shall adopt standards for permissible electronic devices and software applications used by a school district or open-enrollment charter school.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and electronic device/software standards statute.
